brand.name: Misana
brand.longTagline: Eighty kilometres. One coast. One house.

homepage.heroSub: Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton. One house. The drivers, the cars, the yachts, the helicopters, the addresses you need on the coast.
homepage.eventsTitle: When the coast is its busiest

request.title: Make a request
request.subtitle: Tell us what you need on the coast. We answer within twenty-four hours, in Riviera hours.
request.contextIntro: Pick the service you have in mind.
request.detailIntro: A few questions to give us the picture. Skip what you do not know.
request.notesHint: Allergies, special occasions, preferences. Anything we should know.
request.datesIntro: When are you on the coast.
request.noService: Pick at least one service to continue.
request.multiHint: Pick one or several. We arrange them together.

serviceTagline.chauffeur: A driver, a sedan, a route on the coast.
serviceTagline.cars: A grand tourer or a supercar, on key.
serviceTagline.yacht: A day or a week along the coast.
serviceTagline.access: A table, a suite, a beach kept for you.

chauffeur.vehiclePrefHint: Optional. We propose if you skip.
chauffeur.priceFootnote: Indicative one-way fares. VIP welcome and luggage assistance included. Confirmed at booking.

cars.brandHint: Optional. Pick the house, we suggest the model.
cars.fleetHint: Indicative daily rate. Insurance and standard kilometres included.
cars.priceFootnote: Indicative rates per day. Daily allowance, insurance and standard kilometres included. Confirmed at booking.

helicopter.destinationHint: Routes from your chosen hub. Times and indicative fares.
helicopter.modelPrefHint: Choose, or let us match cabin to party.
helicopter.priceFootnote: Indicative one-way fares. Mercedes V-Class chauffeur included at both ends. Confirmed at booking.

crossSell.title: Anything else on the coast
crossSell.body: We orchestrate several services in one request. Add what you might need.

access.establishmentHint: Leave blank if no preference. We propose the right address.

contact.name: Full name
contact.whatsappSame: Reach me on WhatsApp on this number
contact.messageHint: Preferences, allergies, occasions, the people travelling with you.
contact.bookingForOther: I am booking for someone else

review.title: Before you send
review.intro: A quick look at the request. You can step back and adjust.
review.promise: We answer within twenty-four hours, in Riviera hours.

thanks.title: Received.
thanks.body: We have your request. The right person will be in touch within twenty-four hours.

errors.submit: Something on our side. Please try again.

cookie.title: A note on cookies
cookie.body: We keep this short. Strictly necessary cookies only. No tracking by default.

notFound.title: Not on the map.
notFound.body: The page you asked for is not here. It may have moved.

event.hero: {event} brings the coast to its busiest. We orchestrate the week from end to end. Chauffeurs in place by Tuesday. Tables held from Wednesday. Helicopter on call.
event.servicesSection: What we orchestrate during the event
event.servicesBody: We pre-position drivers, helicopters and tables for the week. The right vehicle, the right table, the right address. Booked early.

services.chauffeur: Drivers in place from Tuesday. Yacht-limo coverage on demand.
services.helicopter: Heliports held. Twenty-minute hops from the coast.
services.access: Tables, terraces, beaches kept for you. Without queue.
services.cars: Performance and supercar fleet, day and week.

event.whenBody: {event} takes place every {month} in {city}. We start taking requests three months before. The week itself is a single piece of orchestration. The earlier the request, the calmer the answer.
event.discretionBody: We work for guests, regulars, the right address. No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak, no logo. The trust that comes with returning year after year.

cars.hubLead: Performance, supercars, SUV and limousines. Twelve cars curated by us, delivered where you want, the keys handed in person.
cars.hubDescription: Luxury car rental on the French Riviera. Mercedes, Audi RS, Porsche, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin. Daily rates with all-inclusive insurance.

fiche.relatedSection: Other cars in the same range

transfer.hero: A driver, a sedan, the right name on the sign. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton. We hold the route from end to end.
transfer.howBody: We track flight times. The driver is at the gate. Bags are handled. The route is decided by traffic at that moment, not the GPS by default. The arrival is on time, in calm.
transfer.fleetBody: Mercedes mostly. Range Rover Vogue when terrain or weather asks for it. All vehicles maintained, glass tinted, water, phone chargers, the small things that matter.

included.welcome: VIP welcome at the gate, name on the sign
included.flightTracking: Flight tracking, no penalty for delays

faq.q1: What if my flight is delayed?
faq.a1: We track every commercial and private flight in real time. The driver waits up to sixty minutes after landing for commercial flights, thirty minutes for private aviation, with no surcharge.
faq.q2: Can I add a stop on the way?
faq.a2: Yes. We do this often, especially for restaurant arrivals, baggage drops at the hotel, or a private call by the road. Mention it in the request.
faq.a3: Yes. Infant seats (zero to two years), child seats (two to four), boosters (four to ten) are complimentary. Mention the count and ages in the request.
